languages.text: Судя по отросткам Погонщицы, эта ксенотварь явно обладает сложным устройством, но найти слабые места вам не удается.
Judging by the Drover's shoots, this xenobeast clearly possesses a sophisticated structure, but you cannot detect any weaknesses.
languages.original_text: Судя по отросткам Погонщицы, эта ксенотварь явно обладает сложным устройством, но найти слабые места вам не удается.

traits.locale_text: Judging by the Drover's shoots, this xenobeast clearly possesses a sophisticated structure, but you cannot detect any weaknesses.
Judging by the Drover's shoots, this xenobeast clearly possesses a sophisticated structure, but you cannot detect any weaknesses.
Judging by the Drover's shoots, this xenobeast clearly possesses a sophisticated structure, but you cannot detect any weaknesses.

languages.text: ドローバーの芽を見てわかるように、この異種生物は確かに高度な構造を持っているが、弱点を見つけることはできない。
languages.original_text: Judging by the Drover's shoots, this xenobeast clearly possesses a sophisticated structure, but you cannot detect any weaknesses.

traits.locale_text: ドローバーの芽を見てわかるように、この異種生物は確かに高度な構造を持っているが、弱点を見つけることはできない。

languages.text: 从拒生花的枝芽来看，这种异形生物显然有着复杂的结构，可惜你从中找不到任何弱点。
languages.original_text: Judging by the Drover's shoots, this xenobeast clearly possesses a sophisticated structure, but you cannot detect any weaknesses.

traits.locale_text: 从拒生花的枝芽来看，这种异形生物显然有着复杂的结构，可惜你从中找不到任何弱点。

languages.text: Den Trieben des Treibers zufolge hat diese Xenobestie eine komplexe Struktur, aber du erkennst keinerlei Schwächen.
languages.original_text: Judging by the Drover's shoots, this xenobeast clearly possesses a sophisticated structure, but you cannot detect any weaknesses.

traits.locale_text: Den Trieben des Treibers zufolge hat diese Xenobestie eine komplexe Struktur, aber du erkennst keinerlei Schwächen.

languages.text: D'après ses drageons, le Chasseur est une xénobête à la structure complexe, mais vous ne détectez aucun point faible.
languages.original_text: Judging by the Drover's shoots, this xenobeast clearly possesses a sophisticated structure, but you cannot detect any weaknesses.

traits.locale_text: D'après ses drageons, le Chasseur est une xénobête à la structure complexe, mais vous ne détectez aucun point faible.

languages.text: A juzgar por los tallos del Pastor, la xenobestia tiene una estructura compleja, pero no logras encontrar ningún punto débil en ella.
languages.original_text: Judging by the Drover's shoots, this xenobeast clearly possesses a sophisticated structure, but you cannot detect any weaknesses.

traits.locale_text: A juzgar por los tallos del Pastor, la xenobestia tiene una estructura compleja, pero no logras encontrar ningún punto débil en ella.

languages.text: Çoban'ın filizlerine bakılırsa bu zenohayvanın açıkça karmaşık bir yapıya sahip olduğu görülüyor ancak herhangi bir zayıf noktasını tespit edemiyorsun.
languages.original_text: Judging by the Drover's shoots, this xenobeast clearly possesses a sophisticated structure, but you cannot detect any weaknesses.

traits.locale_text: Çoban'ın filizlerine bakılırsa bu zenohayvanın açıkça karmaşık bir yapıya sahip olduğu görülüyor ancak herhangi bir zayıf noktasını tespit edemiyorsun.
